name: Berny Table Lamp - 22 Inch Height - TBL4264 - Black - Safavieh
description:
Illuminate your space with the Berny 22 inch black iron table lamp. This beautifully crafted piece brings a touch of elegance and a hint of modernity to any room. The solid 100 percent iron construction ensures stability and gives off an industrial charm that complements contemporary decor. Standing at 22 inches, this lamp is perfect for a desk, bedside, or living room table.

The sleek black finish adds the right amount of sophistication and blends seamlessly with various color palettes. Whether you are reading a book or setting the mood for relaxation, the Berny table lamp provides the perfect glow. Its timeless design makes it an ideal addition to your home interior. Illuminate your moments with a style that speaks volumes without saying a word.
